description: Allow-list for lint:public-helper-allowlist (PLA-0039 / Story 00523). Every callsite of `apiV2()` (the customer-public surface at `/samantha/v2`) MUST be in `allowed_paths`. New apiV2 callers require a vetted entry — that is the gate that keeps internal/admin features from accidentally routing through the public, deprecation-bound, billed customer surface. Adding a row implies: (a) the route exists in the OpenAPI v2 spec; (b) the response is a stable DTO with a `MapPublic` mapper (PLA-0039 / Story 00532); (c) the work has been considered for SOC 2 audit-event emission. Removing apiV2 from a file is always safe — that file should also drop off this list.
